name: Peak Detector
description: Tracks and holds peak (max/min) values with optional auto-reset
author: NISystem
code:
# Peak Detector
# Tracks and holds maximum and minimum values

import time

input_tag = config.get('input_tag', 'Pressure_In')
track_max = config.get('track_max', True)
track_min = config.get('track_min', True)
reset_period = config.get('auto_reset_seconds', 0)

value = tags.get(input_tag, 0)
now = time.time()

# Initialize or check for auto-reset
if 'peak_max' not in state or (reset_period > 0 and now - state.get('reset_time', 0) > reset_period):
    state['peak_max'] = value
    state['peak_min'] = value
    state['reset_time'] = now

# Update peaks
if track_max and value > state['peak_max']:
    state['peak_max'] = value

if track_min and value < state['peak_min']:
    state['peak_min'] = value

peak_range = state['peak_max'] - state['peak_min']

publish(f'py.{input_tag}_PeakMax', state['peak_max'])
publish(f'py.{input_tag}_PeakMin', state['peak_min'])
publish(f'py.{input_tag}_PeakRange', peak_range)
